nasb.text: All things that the Father has are Mine; therefore I said that He takes of Mine and will disclose it to you.

esv.text: All that the Father has is mine; therefore I said that he will take what is mine and declare it to you.

cnv.text: 父所有的一切，都是我的；所以我說，他要把從我那裡所領受的告訴你們。

ccb.text: 因为父的一切都是我的，所以我才说祂要把从我那里领受的指示你们。

csbs.text: 父所拥有的一切，都是我的。所以我说，圣灵将从我领受，并传讲给你们。
